Feature_Name: Inter-gNB-DU LTM Handover UE Context Setup
Feature_Description: This procedure is used for the case when the UE moves from one gNB-DU to another gNB-DU within the same gNB-CU during NR operation (Inter-gNB-DU Mobility for intra-NR).

It is also applicable for cases where the UE moves from one gNB-DU to another gNB-DU within the same gNB-CU when only MCG SRB is available during EN-DC operation (Inter-gNB-DU Mobility using MCG SRB).

Furthermore, it covers scenarios like inter-gNB-DU conditional PSCell change using MCG SRB without MN negotiation in EN-DC, where the UE moves between gNB-DUs within the same gNB-CU for conditional PSCell change.
Feature_Objectives: To enable the gNB-CU to prepare and send the F1AP "UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST" message to the candidate gNB-DU.
To allow the candidate gNB-DU to respond with the F1AP "UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE" message.
To ensure the gNB-CU handles the "UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE" message for Inter-gNB-DU LTM Handover, creating a UE context and setting up data bearers in the target gNB-DU.
Procedure_Implementation_Steps: The gNB-CU sends an UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message to the target/candidate gNB-DU to create a UE context and setup one or more data bearers. This message may include a HandoverPreparationInformation (for intra-NR mobility), a CG-ConfigInfo (for EN-DC mobility), or Conditional Inter-DU Mobility Information (for conditional PSCell change). In case of NG-RAN sharing, the gNB-CU includes the serving PLMN ID (for SNPNs the serving SNPN ID). The message may be sent for each candidate cell.

The target/candidate gNB-DU responds to the gNB-CU with an UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message. For conditional PSCell change, this response may include the target cell ID that was requested from the gNB-CU, and is sent for each requested candidate cell.

Code_Instructions.description: Defines the structure for the F1AP UE Context Setup Request message, containing all necessary Information Elements (IEs) for the procedure.
A helper function responsible for populating or encoding the F1AP UE Context Setup Request message with specific UE context information before transmission.
Defines the structure for the F1AP UE Context Setup Response message, containing IEs such as the F1AP UE ID, Criticality Diagnostics, etc.
A helper function within the gNB RRC layer (likely CU) to generate the F1AP UE Context Setup Request message, preparing it for transmission to the DU.
A helper function responsible for decoding or parsing the received F1AP UE Context Setup Response message from the DU.
A control plane helper function to process the F1AP UE Context Setup Response, likely involving updating UE context state or handling success/failure indications.
Utility function to retrieve a unique transaction identifier for F1AP messages, ensuring proper correlation of requests and responses within the F1AP protocol.

Piggy_Backed_IES_Info: Not applicable for the scoped messages in this procedure.
